debug_info.goal:
p : IMO2021P5.Position
⊢ ∃ k,
    (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).1 < k ∧
        k < (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).2 ∨
      (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).2 < k ∧
        k < (IMO2021P5.Position.swapped (IMO2021P5.Position.nth p k) k).1

failed_attempts:
let n := 2021
  let is_bad (p : Position) (k : Fin 2021) : Prop :=
    let (w1, w2) := p.swapped k
    (w1 < k ∧ k < w2) ∨ (w2 < k ∧ k < w1)
  
  -- We want to prove ∃ k, is_bad (p.nth k) k
  
  -- Lemma: For any position p, the number of bad nodes is odd.
  have bad_count_odd : ∀ (q : Position), Odd (Fintype.card {k // is_bad q k}) := by
    intro q
    let s (i : Fin 2021) := (q ((q.symm i) + 1))
    -- s i is the clockwise neighbor of i
    -- i is local max if s⁻¹ i < i > s i, min if s⁻¹ i > i < s i
    -- is_bad i iff not (local max or local min)
    -- In a cycle, peaks and valleys alternate, so count(max) = count(min)
    -- Total extrema = 2 * count(max), which is even.
    -- Total nodes n = 2021 is odd.
    -- card bad = n - card extrema = odd - even = odd.
    sorry -- The geometric proof of "peaks=valleys" is standard but lengthy to formalize from scratch.
  
  -- Let B_k be the set of bad nodes at step k. |B_k| is odd.
  -- We consider the sum over k of |B_k|. Since n is odd, sum is odd.
  -- We partition the pairs (k, j) with j ∈ B_k into diagonal (k=j) and off-diagonal.
  -- Off-diagonal terms come in pairs or have even parity sum due to swap symmetry.
  -- Thus sum_{k} I(k ∈ B_k) is odd, so at least one such k exists.
  
  have total_hits_odd : Odd (Finset.card (Finset.filter (fun k => is_bad (p.nth k) k) Finset.univ)) := by
    sorry -- The dynamic parity argument described above.

  have hits_pos : 0 < Finset.card (Finset.filter (fun k => is_bad (p.nth k) k) Finset.univ) := by
    rw [Nat.odd_iff] at total_hits_odd
    apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero
    intro h
    rw [h] at total_hits_odd
    contradiction

  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Finset.card_pos.mp hits_pos
  rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hk
  use k
  exact hk.2
